about
About ICAIDE 2026
2026 2nd International Conference on Artificial Intelligence and Digital Ethics (ICAIDE 2026)
2026 2nd International Conference on Artificial Intelligence and Digital Ethics (ICAIDE 2026) will be held in Guangzhou, China&Singapore from May 22 to 24, 2026. As the successor to the successful ICAIDE 2025, this edition will push boundaries by tackling emerging challenges in AI ethics while maintaining focus on core issues like algorithmic transparency and data governance. This year's conference introduces several groundbreaking elements, including in-depth explorations of Artificial General Intelligence ethics and the societal implications of quantum computing, topics that represent the next frontier in digital ethics discourse. A key differentiator from previous editions will be the strong emphasis on practical implementation, featuring hands-on workshops for applying ethical frameworks and case-study competitions highlighting successful ethical AI deployments across industries. The 2026 program also innovates with interactive formats like ethics hackathons and AI red-teaming exercises designed to identify and address ethical vulnerabilities in real time. New to this edition are dedicated sessions bridging policy and industry, including a high-level Policy-Industry Roundtable bringing together global regulators and technology leaders to develop actionable governance guidelines, as well as venture capital panels examining funding mechanisms for ethically-aligned AI innovation. The conference will continue examining fundamental themes such as AI's impact on human rights and sustainable development while expanding its scope to include culturally diverse perspectives on digital ethics. With these enhancements, ICAIDE 2026 aims to transition from theoretical discussions to concrete solutions, offering participants unprecedented opportunities to shape the future of responsible AI development through collaborative problem-solving and policy-making. Researchers, practitioners and policymakers are invited to contribute to this vital dialogue as we work collectively to ensure AI technologies develop in alignment with human values and societal needs.

Details of The Attending Registration
Join as PresenterIf you are only interested in giving a presentation at the conference without publishing your paper in the proceedings, you can choose to attend ICAIDE 2026 as a Presenter. As a presenter, you need to submit the slide of your presentation during the registration. For further information, please contact us.
Join as ListenerICAIDE 2026 is an unmissable conference. It is a good chance and an effective platform for you to meet many renowned experts and researchers in the field of the latest academic research. You are welcome to attend this great event. You just need to complete the registration as a Listener before the registration deadline.
Details of The Registration Fees
1. Registration fees include conference proceedings, lunches, souvenirs and attending all technical sessions.
2. The registration fee does not include:
• Accommodation
• Visa application fee
• Transportation fare
3. At least one author for each accepted final paper must pre-register.
4. Completed registrations will be acknowledged by the Organizing Committee within 2-5 workdays after receiving your payment.
5. If you cannot attend the conference for any reason, we will post the print proceedings to you together with the payment receipt/invoice.
Refunds Policy
If the participants request cancellation and refund due to personal reasons, the following refund policy applies.
* 60 days ahead of the conference: 70% of payment refund
* 30-60 days ahead of the conference: 50% of payment refund
* Within 30 days ahead of the conference: 30% of payment refund
* After conference: no refund
Cancellation and refund request must be made formally by email.
The organizing committees reserves the right to change the dates and place of the conference due to force majeure. Losses thus incurred from the force majeure events shall not be liable and refunds policy shall not apply as well.

20位青年学者展示了最新研究成果，涵盖图像水印、知识图谱、情感计算、医疗伦理等多个领域，展现了人工智能技术的多样性与创新性。
随着闭幕式的结束，本次会议正式画上了圆满的句号。然而，人工智能与数字伦理的研究与发展之路仍在继续。我们相信，通过本次会议的交流与合作，各位专家学者们将带着新的启发与思考，回到各自的研究领域与工作岗位，继续为推动人工智能与数字伦理的协同发展贡献自己的智慧与力量。让我们期待在未来的学术交流与实践中，能够看到更多创新的成果与应用，共同携手构建一个更加美好的数字未来！

about
About ICAIDE 2026
2026 2nd International Conference on Artificial Intelligence and Digital Ethics (ICAIDE 2026)
2026 2nd International Conference on Artificial Intelligence and Digital Ethics (ICAIDE 2026) will be held in Guangzhou, China&Singapore from May 22 to 24, 2026. As the successor to the successful ICAIDE 2025, this edition will push boundaries by tackling emerging challenges in AI ethics while maintaining focus on core issues like algorithmic transparency and data governance. This year's conference introduces several groundbreaking elements, including in-depth explorations of Artificial General Intelligence ethics and the societal implications of quantum computing, topics that represent the next frontier in digital ethics discourse. A key differentiator from previous editions will be the strong emphasis on practical implementation, featuring hands-on workshops for applying ethical frameworks and case-study competitions highlighting successful ethical AI deployments across industries. The 2026 program also innovates with interactive formats like ethics hackathons and AI red-teaming exercises designed to identify and address ethical vulnerabilities in real time. New to this edition are dedicated sessions bridging policy and industry, including a high-level Policy-Industry Roundtable bringing together global regulators and technology leaders to develop actionable governance guidelines, as well as venture capital panels examining funding mechanisms for ethically-aligned AI innovation. The conference will continue examining fundamental themes such as AI's impact on human rights and sustainable development while expanding its scope to include culturally diverse perspectives on digital ethics. With these enhancements, ICAIDE 2026 aims to transition from theoretical discussions to concrete solutions, offering participants unprecedented opportunities to shape the future of responsible AI development through collaborative problem-solving and policy-making. Researchers, practitioners and policymakers are invited to contribute to this vital dialogue as we work collectively to ensure AI technologies develop in alignment with human values and societal needs.

about
About ICAIDE 2026
2026 2nd International Conference on Artificial Intelligence and Digital Ethics (ICAIDE 2026)
2026 2nd International Conference on Artificial Intelligence and Digital Ethics (ICAIDE 2026) will be held in Guangzhou, China&Singapore from May 22 to 24, 2026. As the successor to the successful ICAIDE 2025, this edition will push boundaries by tackling emerging challenges in AI ethics while maintaining focus on core issues like algorithmic transparency and data governance. This year's conference introduces several groundbreaking elements, including in-depth explorations of Artificial General Intelligence ethics and the societal implications of quantum computing, topics that represent the next frontier in digital ethics discourse. A key differentiator from previous editions will be the strong emphasis on practical implementation, featuring hands-on workshops for applying ethical frameworks and case-study competitions highlighting successful ethical AI deployments across industries. The 2026 program also innovates with interactive formats like ethics hackathons and AI red-teaming exercises designed to identify and address ethical vulnerabilities in real time. New to this edition are dedicated sessions bridging policy and industry, including a high-level Policy-Industry Roundtable bringing together global regulators and technology leaders to develop actionable governance guidelines, as well as venture capital panels examining funding mechanisms for ethically-aligned AI innovation. The conference will continue examining fundamental themes such as AI's impact on human rights and sustainable development while expanding its scope to include culturally diverse perspectives on digital ethics. With these enhancements, ICAIDE 2026 aims to transition from theoretical discussions to concrete solutions, offering participants unprecedented opportunities to shape the future of responsible AI development through collaborative problem-solving and policy-making. Researchers, practitioners and policymakers are invited to contribute to this vital dialogue as we work collectively to ensure AI technologies develop in alignment with human values and societal needs.

About ICAIDE 2026
2026 2nd International Conference on Artificial Intelligence and Digital Ethics (ICAIDE 2026)
2026 2nd International Conference on Artificial Intelligence and Digital Ethics (ICAIDE 2026) will be held in Guangzhou, China&Singapore from May 22 to 24, 2026. As the successor to the successful ICAIDE 2025, this edition will push boundaries by tackling emerging challenges in AI ethics while maintaining focus on core issues like algorithmic transparency and data governance. This year's conference introduces several groundbreaking elements, including in-depth explorations of Artificial General Intelligence ethics and the societal implications of quantum computing, topics that represent the next frontier in digital ethics discourse. A key differentiator from previous editions will be the strong emphasis on practical implementation, featuring hands-on workshops for applying ethical frameworks and case-study competitions highlighting successful ethical AI deployments across industries. The 2026 program also innovates with interactive formats like ethics hackathons and AI red-teaming exercises designed to identify and address ethical vulnerabilities in real time. New to this edition are dedicated sessions bridging policy and industry, including a high-level Policy-Industry Roundtable bringing together global regulators and technology leaders to develop actionable governance guidelines, as well as venture capital panels examining funding mechanisms for ethically-aligned AI innovation. The conference will continue examining fundamental themes such as AI's impact on human rights and sustainable development while expanding its scope to include culturally diverse perspectives on digital ethics. With these enhancements, ICAIDE 2026 aims to transition from theoretical discussions to concrete solutions, offering participants unprecedented opportunities to shape the future of responsible AI development through collaborative problem-solving and policy-making. Researchers, practitioners and policymakers are invited to contribute to this vital dialogue as we work collectively to ensure AI technologies develop in alignment with human values and societal needs.

2025年人工智能与数字伦理国际学术会议（ICAIDE 2025）于2025年5月30日顺利落幕
2025年5月30日，在广东省高等教育学会的指导下，由广州南方学院、广东省高等教育学会人工智能与高等教育研究分会共同主办，广州南方学院电气与计算机工程学院和AEIC学术交流中心承办的2025年人工智能与数字伦理国际学术会议（ICAIDE 2025）在广州科学城总部国际酒店盛大开幕。本次会议吸引了来自全球顶尖专家学者、行业精英及高校师生齐聚一堂，共同探讨人工智能与数字伦理领域的前沿议题。
大会组委
凝聚智慧，展望未来
上午9:20，开幕仪式正式拉开帷幕。开幕式由广州南方学院电气与计算机工程学院副院长苑俊英教授主持。她对与会嘉宾表示热烈欢迎，并简要介绍了会议的背景与目标。苑俊英教授强调，人工智能技术的快速发展为人类社会带来巨大机遇的同时，也伴随着伦理挑战，本次会议旨在搭建跨学科对话平台，推动技术与伦理的协同发展。

刘富春教授介绍了分布式随机离散事件系统的故障预测与验证算法，涵盖经典系统到随机系统的扩展，以及分布式方法在故障预测中的应用和可靠性问题。
多元议题，深度探讨
下午的口头报告围绕人工智能与数字伦理的多个细分领域展开。
口头报告由广州南方学院电气与计算机工程学院大数据与人工智能系副主任吴恒志高级工程师主持。
广州南方学院电气与计算机工程学院大数据与人工智能系副主任吴恒志高级工程师主持
20位青年学者展示了最新研究成果，涵盖图像水印、知识图谱、情感计算、医疗伦理等多个领域，展现了人工智能技术的多样性与创新性。
随着闭幕式的结束，本次会议正式画上了圆满的句号。然而，人工智能与数字伦理的研究与发展之路仍在继续。我们相信，通过本次会议的交流与合作，各位专家学者们将带着新的启发与思考，回到各自的研究领域与工作岗位，继续为推动人工智能与数字伦理的协同发展贡献自己的智慧与力量。让我们期待在未来的学术交流与实践中，能够看到更多创新的成果与应用，共同携手构建一个更加美好的数字未来！

About ICAIDE 2026
2026 2nd International Conference on Artificial Intelligence and Digital Ethics (ICAIDE 2026)
2026 2nd International Conference on Artificial Intelligence and Digital Ethics (ICAIDE 2026) will be held in Guangzhou, China&Singapore from May 22 to 24, 2026. As the successor to the successful ICAIDE 2025, this edition will push boundaries by tackling emerging challenges in AI ethics while maintaining focus on core issues like algorithmic transparency and data governance. This year's conference introduces several groundbreaking elements, including in-depth explorations of Artificial General Intelligence ethics and the societal implications of quantum computing, topics that represent the next frontier in digital ethics discourse. A key differentiator from previous editions will be the strong emphasis on practical implementation, featuring hands-on workshops for applying ethical frameworks and case-study competitions highlighting successful ethical AI deployments across industries. The 2026 program also innovates with interactive formats like ethics hackathons and AI red-teaming exercises designed to identify and address ethical vulnerabilities in real time. New to this edition are dedicated sessions bridging policy and industry, including a high-level Policy-Industry Roundtable bringing together global regulators and technology leaders to develop actionable governance guidelines, as well as venture capital panels examining funding mechanisms for ethically-aligned AI innovation. The conference will continue examining fundamental themes such as AI's impact on human rights and sustainable development while expanding its scope to include culturally diverse perspectives on digital ethics. With these enhancements, ICAIDE 2026 aims to transition from theoretical discussions to concrete solutions, offering participants unprecedented opportunities to shape the future of responsible AI development through collaborative problem-solving and policy-making. Researchers, practitioners and policymakers are invited to contribute to this vital dialogue as we work collectively to ensure AI technologies develop in alignment with human values and societal needs.

Details of The Registration Fees
1. Registration fees include conference proceedings, lunches, souvenirs and attending all technical sessions.

• Visa application fee
• Transportation fare

Refunds Policy
If the participants request cancellation and refund due to personal reasons, the following refund policy applies.
* 60 days ahead of the conference: 70% of payment refund
* 30-60 days ahead of the conference: 50% of payment refund
* Within 30 days ahead of the conference: 30% of payment refund
* After conference: no refund
Cancellation and refund request must be made formally by email.
The organizing committees reserves the right to change the dates and place of the conference due to force majeure. Losses thus incurred from the force majeure events shall not be liable and refunds policy shall not apply as well.

About ICAIDE 2026
2026 2nd International Conference on Artificial Intelligence and Digital Ethics (ICAIDE 2026)
2026 2nd International Conference on Artificial Intelligence and Digital Ethics (ICAIDE 2026) will be held in Guangzhou, China&Singapore from May 22 to 24, 2026. As the successor to the successful ICAIDE 2025, this edition will push boundaries by tackling emerging challenges in AI ethics while maintaining focus on core issues like algorithmic transparency and data governance. This year's conference introduces several groundbreaking elements, including in-depth explorations of Artificial General Intelligence ethics and the societal implications of quantum computing, topics that represent the next frontier in digital ethics discourse. A key differentiator from previous editions will be the strong emphasis on practical implementation, featuring hands-on workshops for applying ethical frameworks and case-study competitions highlighting successful ethical AI deployments across industries. The 2026 program also innovates with interactive formats like ethics hackathons and AI red-teaming exercises designed to identify and address ethical vulnerabilities in real time. New to this edition are dedicated sessions bridging policy and industry, including a high-level Policy-Industry Roundtable bringing together global regulators and technology leaders to develop actionable governance guidelines, as well as venture capital panels examining funding mechanisms for ethically-aligned AI innovation. The conference will continue examining fundamental themes such as AI's impact on human rights and sustainable development while expanding its scope to include culturally diverse perspectives on digital ethics. With these enhancements, ICAIDE 2026 aims to transition from theoretical discussions to concrete solutions, offering participants unprecedented opportunities to shape the future of responsible AI development through collaborative problem-solving and policy-making. Researchers, practitioners and policymakers are invited to contribute to this vital dialogue as we work collectively to ensure AI technologies develop in alignment with human values and societal needs.

2026 2nd International Conference on Artificial Intelligence and Digital Ethics (ICAIDE 2026) will be held in Guangzhou, China&Singapore from May 22 to 24, 2026. As the successor to the successful ICAIDE 2025, this edition will push boundaries by tackling emerging challenges in AI ethics while maintaining focus on core issues like algorithmic transparency and data governance. This year's conference introduces several groundbreaking elements, including in-depth explorations of Artificial General Intelligence ethics and the societal implications of quantum computing, topics that represent the next frontier in digital ethics discourse. A key differentiator from previous editions will be the strong emphasis on practical implementation, featuring hands-on workshops for applying ethical frameworks and case-study competitions highlighting successful ethical AI deployments across industries. The 2026 program also innovates with interactive formats like ethics hackathons and AI red-teaming exercises designed to identify and address ethical vulnerabilities in real time. New to this edition are dedicated sessions bridging policy and industry, including a high-level Policy-Industry Roundtable bringing together global regulators and technology leaders to develop actionable governance guidelines, as well as venture capital panels examining funding mechanisms for ethically-aligned AI innovation. The conference will continue examining fundamental themes such as AI's impact on human rights and sustainable development while expanding its scope to include culturally diverse perspectives on digital ethics. With these enhancements, ICAIDE 2026 aims to transition from theoretical discussions to concrete solutions, offering participants unprecedented opportunities to shape the future of responsible AI development through collaborative problem-solving and policy-making. Researchers, practitioners and policymakers are invited to contribute to this vital dialogue as we work collectively to ensure AI technologies develop in alignment with human values and societal needs.

Details of The Attending Registration
Join as PresenterIf you are only interested in giving a presentation at the conference without publishing your paper in the proceedings, you can choose to attend ICAIDE 2026 as a Presenter. As a presenter, you need to submit the slide of your presentation during the registration. For further information, please contact us.
Join as ListenerICAIDE 2026 is an unmissable conference. It is a good chance and an effective platform for you to meet many renowned experts and researchers in the field of the latest academic research. You are welcome to attend this great event. You just need to complete the registration as a Listener before the registration deadline.
Details of The Registration Fees
1. Registration fees include conference proceedings, lunches, souvenirs and attending all technical sessions.
2. The registration fee does not include:
• Accommodation
• Visa application fee
• Transportation fare
3. At least one author for each accepted final paper must pre-register.
4. Completed registrations will be acknowledged by the Organizing Committee within 2-5 workdays after receiving your payment.
5. If you cannot attend the conference for any reason, we will post the print proceedings to you together with the payment receipt/invoice.
Refunds Policy
If the participants request cancellation and refund due to personal reasons, the following refund policy applies.
* 60 days ahead of the conference: 70% of payment refund
* 30-60 days ahead of the conference: 50% of payment refund
* Within 30 days ahead of the conference: 30% of payment refund
* After conference: no refund
Cancellation and refund request must be made formally by email.
The organizing committees reserves the right to change the dates and place of the conference due to force majeure. Losses thus incurred from the force majeure events shall not be liable and refunds policy shall not apply as well.

2025年5月30日，在广东省高等教育学会的指导下，由广州南方学院、广东省高等教育学会人工智能与高等教育研究分会共同主办，广州南方学院电气与计算机工程学院和AEIC学术交流中心承办的2025年人工智能与数字伦理国际学术会议（ICAIDE 2025）在广州科学城总部国际酒店盛大开幕。本次会议吸引了来自全球顶尖专家学者、行业精英及高校师生齐聚一堂，共同探讨人工智能与数字伦理领域的前沿议题。

随着闭幕式的结束，本次会议正式画上了圆满的句号。然而，人工智能与数字伦理的研究与发展之路仍在继续。我们相信，通过本次会议的交流与合作，各位专家学者们将带着新的启发与思考，回到各自的研究领域与工作岗位，继续为推动人工智能与数字伦理的协同发展贡献自己的智慧与力量。让我们期待在未来的学术交流与实践中，能够看到更多创新的成果与应用，共同携手构建一个更加美好的数字未来！
